title: porrum fistulosum
intro: Porrum fistulosum, also known as Welsh onion or scallion, is a plant that belongs to the Allium family and is commonly used in Asian and European cuisine. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of consuming Welsh onion include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Welsh onion can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
